S.FORM: == satangahan : == bihid u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ŤáČ nu Amilika :face nu Zipun :ť°Ē u canan ku bihid(bihidśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == bińßid u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :* nu amir~…ĺika :fa ¶…ô nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku bińßid(bińßid***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == bihid u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ŤáČ nu Amilika :face nu Zipun :ť°Ē u canan ku bihid(bihidśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == bińßid u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :* nu amir~…ĺika :fa ¶…ô nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku bińßid(bińßid***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
